posts.author: davidmarmon (David Marmon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

We are trying to sync our google calendar to flow events through zapier into Monday. We’re running into an issue and we’ve isolated the zap is not firing due to the dynamic date (whatever date the event is) not being able to be logged in the date column on the board.

Zapier Issue:

image843×192 14.8 KB

Board Column
If we ask zapier to log a static date, it flows just fine. The issue is when we try to use a dynamic date

image846×147 9.36 KB
